extension.description: Monitors Kodi playback events and sends stream metadata — including source URL, HTTP headers (Referer, User-Agent), addon repository info, and content identifiers — to the Media Link Scanner backend for automated source repository detection and crawling.
extension.disclaimer: Requires the Media Link Scanner backend to be running locally or on your network.
extension.news: v1.0.0 - Initial release. Full metadata extraction across 5 layers.
